rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that the only proof (`isUnipotent_one`) reimplements `IsNilpotent.zero` (a @[simp] fact) via `⟨1, by simp⟩` plus an unnecessary `have`/`rw` indirection; acting on it yields a materially cleaner idiomatic proof. Review 1's approval leaves this unnecessary verbosity in place, so the PR after Review 2 is better on proof-quality.
